layoutRegions.name: escalation-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarizes stalled approvals, delegated backups, breach notices, and evidence coverage.

layoutRegions.name: owner-paths
layoutRegions.purpose: Shows owner escalation paths with primary owners, backups, handoffs, evidence, and state.

layoutRegions.name: accountability-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Tracks breach notifications, delegated backups, evidence coverage, and accountability events.

components.name: EscalationPathCard
components.purpose: Owner route card with primary owner, backup, path, handoff, evidence, and stalled count.
interactions: stalled count remains visible at all widths
path and evidence cells wrap without horizontal scrolling

components.name: BreachNotification
components.purpose: Notification row with target, team, reason, sent time, and acknowledgement state.
interactions: row layout collapses to one column on narrow viewports

components.name: AccountabilityChecklist
components.purpose: Rollback-safe control checklist for sealing accountability trails.

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
